_comment: Copy to ~/Library/Application Support/weft/app.json. Endpoints are in priority order (first = most preferred). The app fails over to the next healthy DC and fails back to a preferred one only after it has been healthy for hold_down.
_auth_comment: OPTIONAL : omit the whole `auth` block to skip the sign-in window (preserves the dev / SSH-tunnel-only flow). When present, the app shows a 2-button picker (OpenPubkey / OIDC) before bringing up the tray, caches the resulting session token in macOS Keychain, and stamps Bearer on every WebView API call.

endpoints.name: DC-C-mesh
endpoints._note: Use 'direct' when the device is already on the WireGuard mesh; the webui listener binds the mesh interface only.
